overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring a player character riding a Sunwing mechanical flying mount. The character takes off from a coastal area near derelict sailing ships and soars through a post-apocalyptic landscape of massive overgrown skyscrapers, mist-filled canyons, and tropical beaches, discovering the location 'Legacy's Landfall'.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal waters with derelict sailing vessels

events.description: mechanical Sunwing mount takes off from water surface and begins powered flight
leaving the shipwreck area behind and accelerating toward the mainland ruins

agents.ego_description: character riding a mechanical Sunwing mount, taking off from the ocean surface and accelerating toward the overgrown ruins in the distance

entered.detail: wooden sailing vessel with tattered sails floating on the water
choppy dark blue ocean surface with whitecaps
silhouette of massive overgrown tower structures on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the player character on a Sunwing mount near derelict wooden sailing ships on choppy ocean waters. The mount takes off from the water surface at 2 seconds, ascending and accelerating toward a distant skyline of massive overgrown ruins. The camera follows smoothly as the ships fall behind and the towering structures grow larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban ruins with towering overgrown skyscrapers

events.description: location discovery text 'LEGACY'S LANDFALL' appears on screen
mount banks sharply and ascends between massive tower structures

agents.ego_description: navigating the Sunwing through massive overgrown skyscrapers, banking and turning to avoid collision with the vine-covered structures

entered.detail: massive cylindrical tower completely covered in green vines and vegetation
crumbling concrete and metal frameworks protruding from the water

segments.scene_description: Flying between colossal vine-covered skyscrapers in a flooded urban area, the camera weaves through the massive structures. At 18 seconds, the location text 'LEGACY'S LANDFALL' appears as the mount banks sharply to navigate the tight spaces between towers, with the ocean still visible far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of tropical jungle canopy and coastal cliffs

events.description: mount dives down toward the jungle canopy then pulls up sharply
moving from dense jungle airspace to coastal cliff areas with beaches visible

agents.ego_description: soaring high above the dense jungle canopy, diving down to skim the treetops and revealing coastal beaches and cliffs below

entered.detail: thick green forest treetops covering the ground below
rocky cliff face dropping down to turquoise water

segments.scene_description: The mount soars over a vast expanse of dense jungle canopy, diving down toward the treetops at 26 seconds before pulling up. The scene transitions to reveal coastal cliffs and tropical beaches below as the character flies away from the tower ruins toward the open coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty canyon between massive overgrown ruins

events.description: entering shadowed misty canyon area with diffused lighting
sharp banked turn to navigate through narrow canyon passage

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through narrow mist-filled canyons between towering ruin structures, making tight turns to avoid canyon walls

entered.detail: vertical cliff face covered in dense vegetation and vines
towering rock wall with ancient ruins embedded in the surface
low-hanging fog and mist filling the canyon interior

segments.scene_description: Flying into a narrow mist-filled canyon between massive vertical walls covered in vegetation. The lighting becomes diffused and shadowed at 38 seconds as the mount navigates tight turns through the enclosed space, with waterfalls and ancient ruins visible on the canyon walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical coastal settlement area with beaches and offshore structures

events.description: exiting the narrow canyon into open coastal airspace over beaches
approaching coastal settlement with wooden dock structures visible on shore

agents.ego_description: flying out of the canyon over a beautiful tropical beach with turquoise water, banking right to survey the coastal settlement and docks

entered.detail: white sand beach with palm trees along the shoreline
shallow clear blue-green water near the shore
collection of wooden huts and structures on the beach

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the misty canyon into bright sunlight over a stunning tropical beach with turquoise lagoon waters. The mount banks over the coastline revealing a small settlement with wooden docks and huts. The flight continues along the beach, showcasing the contrast between the white sand, blue water, and lush green vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins at a derelict shipyard and evolves into a flight through overgrown ruins and misty canyons before ending at a sunlit tropical coast. It begins with a Sunwing mount taking off from choppy ocean waters, accelerating away from wooden sailing ships toward a distant skyline of massive overgrown ruins. As the mount weaves between colossal vine-covered skyscrapers in a flooded urban area, the scene shifts toward a vast expanse of dense jungle canopy and coastal cliffs. The camera then dives into a narrow, mist-filled canyon where the lighting becomes diffused and shadowed among vegetation-covered walls and waterfalls. Finally, the mount emerges from the gloom into bright sunlight, banking over a turquoise lagoon and white sandy beaches to reveal a small settlement with wooden docks.
